subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth unto a people who understand! Verily this is a revelation from God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یفقهون و انها لتنزیل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم قل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @predictions and prophecies, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
